_publications._publicationTitle: Epigenomic, genomic, and transcriptomic landscape of schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: Our DNA methylome profiling demonstrated a robust separation between SWNs and neurofibromas (Fig. 1a)...Consensus clustering of the 2000 most variably methylated CpG sites in SWNTS-SWNs (N = 88) showing four stable clusters
details: Successfully demonstrated robust separation between SWNs and neurofibromas through DNA methylome profiling, and identified four stable methylation clusters in SWNTS-SWNs associated with anatomic location
